steps.t: The capture site can be found to the north-east of Celebros. You should search the capture site for signs of the missing heirloom.
The shimmering debris is located near the reflecting pool of the capture site. You should examine the shimmering debris.
The heirloom box is located near the reflecting pool of the capture site. You should take the heirloom box.
Celebros is located in the market east of Tol Ciryarani. You should speak with Celebros.
